name: io.github.chrischall/onthecheap-mcp
description: On the Cheap MCP — free and cheap events, deals and local guides across 14 US cities

environmentVariables.name: OTC_SITE
environmentVariables.description: Which On the Cheap city to read (e.g. charlotte, denver, triangle). Defaults to charlotte.

environmentVariables.name: OTC_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Explicit site URL, overriding OTC_SITE. The sites are public; no credentials are required.
